tasks.subject: Task 1: saml_consent table + sqlc queries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist per-(account,SP) advisory ack; expose sqlc accessors.

**Files:** Create db/migrations/022_saml_consent.sql, db/queries/saml_consent.sql; modify sqlc.yaml (int32/int64 overrides); regenerate pkg/db. sqlc NOT installed — use `go run github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc/cmd/sqlc@v1.30.0 generate`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/022_saml_consent.sql","db/queries/saml_consent.sql","sqlc.yaml","pkg/db/saml_consent.sql.go"],"verifyCommand":"go run github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc/cmd/sqlc@v1.30.0 generate && go build -tags nodynamic ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["4 query methods on db.Querier","params use int32/int64 via sqlc.yaml overrides","go build passes","migration auto-discovered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: SAML consent KV ticket helpers

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/authn/saml_consent.go","pkg/authn/saml_consent_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/authn/ -run SAMLConsent -v","acceptanceCriteria":["mint→peek→consume round-trips","wrong account not found","consume single-use"]}
```
